hints.text: Use systematic resampling (low-variance resampling) instead of naive multinomial resampling. Only resample when the effective sample size (1/Σw²) drops below N/2 to prevent particle depletion
During sensor occlusion, rely solely on odometry prediction without the measurement update step. Track time since last valid scan and log warnings when occlusion exceeds 1 second

For loop closure detection, store landmark features (e.g., corner points from LIDAR) with their poses. Use nearest-neighbor matching with a distance threshold to detect revisited locations, then trigger particle redistribution around the matched pose
